task_completion.description: Open the ReqView project and navigate to the SRS document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ReqView application is open, the project is loaded, and the 'SRS' document is selected in the left navigation pane.

task_completion.description: Locate the first broken link (LEGACY-404) in the SRS document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent scrolls to or selects requirement ID 37 (or the 5th leaf node), and the 'LEGACY-404' link is visible in the traceability column.

task_completion.description: Remove the LEGACY-404 link from requirement ID 37.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks the delete/remove icon next to the 'LEGACY-404' link, or the link is no longer visible in the traceability column for requirement ID 37.

task_completion.description: Locate and remove the second broken link (LEGACY-500) from requirement ID 10.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent navigates to requirement ID 10 (or the 15th leaf node) and deletes the 'LEGACY-500' link, or the link is no longer visible in its traceability column.

task_completion.description: Save the ReqView project after removing the links.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks 'File' -> 'Save', uses the save shortcut, or the unsaved changes indicator (usually an asterisk next to the project name) disappears.

integrity.description: The agent used the ReqView graphical user interface to remove the links.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the ReqView application window, not a terminal or text editor modifying the SRS.json file directly.

integrity.description: The agent only removed the 'LEGACY' links and preserved other valid links.
integrity.visual_evidence: Other traceability links (such as those with the 'NEEDS' prefix) remain visible in the document and were not deleted.

integrity.description: The agent deleted the links, not the requirements themselves.
integrity.visual_evidence: Requirement IDs 37 and 10 are still present in the document; only their specific 'LEGACY' traceability links were removed.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target document is 'SRS'. There are exactly two broken links to be removed, both with the prefix 'LEGACY'. They are 'LEGACY-404' (located in requirement ID 37) and 'LEGACY-500' (located in requirement ID 10). Valid links (e.g., pointing to 'NEEDS') must not be removed.
